body_txt: Due to Time Travel , Immortality , magic aging ( or de-aging ), a child looks significantly older than their biological parent, or at least far too old to be their child. This can occur on either side of the relationship; maybe it's a Kid from the Future , come to warn their parents about some apocalypse before they're even born. Or maybe the parent is The Ageless , and still looks twenty despite having a child thirty years ago . Regardless, this often leads to a Tangled Family Tree . See also Absurdly Youthful Mother and the other subtropes, as well as Living Distant Ancestor . May lead to Outliving One's Offspring .
